source.body_text_sample:
Call us!
(403) 527-8755
Employment
Opportunities.
Join Our Team
At Cypress View Foundation, we believe the strength of our community comes from our people. Our mission is to provide affordable, caring, and vibrant senior living — and it’s our team that brings that mission to life every day.
We offer more than just a job: we offer a meaningful place where you can grow, contribute, and make a real difference in the lives of seniors and families in the Medicine Hat area.
Who We’re Looking For:

Positions may span across areas including but not limited to:

Supportive living & continuing care

Dining and hospitality services

Administrative and facility operations

Activity and wellness programming

Maintenance and housekeeping

Current Opportunities
We encourage you to check back often, as our opportunities are updated frequently to reflect the changing needs of our community. Thank you for considering a career with Cypress View Foundation. We look forward to the possibility of working together to create a vibrant, caring community for our residents.
Contact
Phone: (403) 527-8755
Fax: (403) 527-4889
info@cypressview.org
Location

722 Bassett Crescent NW,
Medicine Hat, Alberta
T1A 7W8

CARF Canada Accreditation ensures we meet defined international standards of quality in health and human services.
